channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [THYROCARE] Thyrocare Board to Meet May 7 for Q4/FY26 Results & Dividend
item.description:
Thyrocare Technologies Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Thursday, May 07, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will discuss and recommend a final dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives closed on April 01, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 07, 2026.
  • To approve Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • To consider and recommend final dividend for FY2025-26.
  • Trading window closed from April 01, 2026.
  • Trading window reopens 48 hours after results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Thyrocare Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PRATIKSH] Vellora Impact expands business scope, appoints Secretarial Auditor
item.description:
Vellora Impact Limited (formerly Pratiksha Chemicals Ltd) announced that its Board of Directors, at a meeting on April 29, 2026, approved significant changes to its Main Objects Clause. The company will expand its business to include manufacturing and trading agricultural inputs, various farming practices, and dealing in gold, diamonds, precious stones, and jewellery. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of Mrs. Shubhangi Rajkumar Agarwal as the Secretarial Auditor for five years, from FY 2025-26 to FY 2029-30, pending shareholder approval. An Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EOGM) will be held on May 22, 2026, to seek shareholder consent for these proposals.

  • Board approved expansion into agriculture, farming, and jewellery business.
  • New Secretarial Auditor appointed for five years, subject to EOGM approval.
  • Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EOGM) scheduled for May 22, 2026.
  • Company name changed from Pratiksha Chemicals Ltd to Vellora Impact Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRATIKSHA CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BANSALWIRE] Bansal Wire Industries Board approves Q4 & FY26 audited results
item.description:
Bansal Wire Industries Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 29, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also approved the Audited Financial Statements for FY26. The company submitted these results along with the Auditor's Reports, which included an unmodified opinion for the financial year 2025-26. The consolidated results encompass subsidiaries Bansal Steel and Power Limited and WI Steel Private Limited.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Audited financial statements for FY26 were also approved.
  • Auditor's Report for FY26 issued an unmodified opinion.
  • Consolidated results include two wholly-owned subsidiaries.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bansal Wire Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JAYNECOIND] Jayaswal Neco to hold EGM on May 21, 2026 for AOA change & warrants
item.description:
Jayaswal Neco Industries Ltd will convene an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) on Thursday, May 21, 2026, at 12:30 P.M. (IST) via Video Conference/Other Audio Visual Means. The EGM seeks shareholder approval for two special resolutions: amending the Company's Articles of Association and authorizing the issuance of warrants through a preferential private placement. E-voting facilities will be available from May 18, 2026, to May 20, 2026, for members holding shares as of May 14, 2026.

  • EGM scheduled for May 21, 2026, via virtual conferencing.
  • Shareholders to vote on amending the Articles of Association.
  • Approval sought for issuing warrants via preferential private placement.
  • E-voting window is from May 18 to May 20, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAYASWAL NECO INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [AVI] AVI Polymers Promoters to Acquire up to 5% Stake from Open Market
item.description:
🔥 Trending

AVI Polymers Ltd. has announced that its Promoter and Promoter Group intend to acquire up to 5% of the company's total paid-up equity share capital through open market transactions. This decision reflects the management's strong conviction in the company's strategic direction and long-term value. The company recently reported a significant financial turnaround in FY26, with revenue surging 4,854x to ₹3312.11 Crore and net profit expanding 25x. AVI Polymers is now debt-free, with net worth at ₹115.99 Crore, and has launched AI subsidiaries KrishiBuddy and AVI Health AI. The acquisitions will be phased and comply with SEBI (SAST) and SEBI (PIT) Regulations.

  • Promoters plan to acquire up to 5% of AVI Polymers' equity from the open market.
  • Move signals strong management confidence in the company's future and value.
  • Company reported 4,854x revenue surge and 25x net profit expansion in FY26.
  • AVI Polymers is now 100% debt-free with a net worth of ₹115.99 Crore.
  • Acquisitions will adhere to SEBI (SAST) and (PIT) Regulations, including insider trading norms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVI Polymers Ltd | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [KMSMEDI] KMS Medisurgi Exempt from SEBI Reg 24A for SME Listing
item.description:
KMS Medisurgi Ltd announced that Regulation 24A of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, which mandates an Annual Secretarial Compliance Report, is not applicable to the company. This exemption is granted under Regulation 15(2) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, because the company is listed on the BSE SME Platform. Consequently, KMS Medisurgi is not required to submit the Annual Secretarial Compliance Report.

  • KMS Medisurgi exempt from SEBI Regulation 24A.
  • Exemption due to listing on BSE SME Platform.
  • Not required to submit Annual Secretarial Compliance Report.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KMS Medisurgi Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [NILACHAL] SFAL Speciality Alloys acquires 1.04 Cr shares in Nilachal Refractories
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SFAL Speciality Alloys Ltd has disclosed the acquisition of 1,04,89,522 equity shares of Nilachal Refractories Limited. This transaction was conducted as an inter-se transfer, pursuant to a Share Purchase Agreement dated March 11, 2026. The acquisition date was April 22, 2026. This disclosure was made in accordance with Regulation 29(1) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Following this acquisition, SFAL Speciality Alloys Ltd holds 1,04,89,522 shares in Nilachal Refractories Limited, representing approximately 51.51% of the target company's total equity share capital of 2,03,61,450 shares.

  • SFAL Speciality Alloys acquired 1,04,89,522 equity shares of Nilachal Refractories.
  • The acquisition was an inter-se transfer via a Share Purchase Agreement.
  • The disclosure was made under SEBI Takeover Regulations, 2011.
  • The acquisition date for the shares was April 22, 2026.
  • SFAL's holding in Nilachal Refractories is now 1,04,89,522 shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NILACHAL REFRACTORIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NILACHAL] Nilachal Refractories: Raj Rani Agarwal disposes 3.35% stake
item.description:
Raj Rani Agarwal has disclosed the disposal of 6,81,823 equity shares of Nilachal Refractories Limited, representing 3.35% of the company's total voting capital. The off-market transaction took place on April 22, 2026. Following this disposal, Raj Rani Agarwal's shareholding in Nilachal Refractories Limited has become zero. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Raj Rani Agarwal disposed of 6,81,823 shares of Nilachal Refractories.
  • This represents a 3.35% stake in the company's total voting capital.
  • The transaction was an off-market sale executed on April 22, 2026.
  • Post-disposal, Raj Rani Agarwal's shareholding in the company is now zero.
  • The disclosure was made as per SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NILACHAL REFRACTORIES LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [IOB] IOB Reports Nil Deviation in Fund Utilization for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Indian Overseas Bank has submitted a NIL Statement of Deviation(s) or Variation(s) in the utilization of proceeds from equity shares and non-convertible debt securities for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The bank confirmed that no funds were raised through equity shares during the quarter. For the ₹1000 crore Basel III Compliant Tier II Bonds raised via private placement on January 23, 2026, there was no deviation or variation in the use of these funds. This filing ensures compliance with Regulation 32(1), 52(7) & 52(7A) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • IOB filed a NIL deviation statement for Q4 FY26 fund utilization.
  • No equity funds were raised during the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • ₹1000 Cr Basel III Tier II Bonds showed no deviation in fund usage.
  • The bank confirms compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN OVERSEAS BANK | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [NILACHAL] Nilachal Refractories: Promoters Sell 0.62% Stake Off-Market
item.description:
Two promoter group entities, Bhagwati Prasad Jalan and Sons HUF and Niraj Jalan and Others HUF, have divested a combined 0.62% stake in Nilachal Refractories Limited. Bhagwati Prasad Jalan and Sons HUF sold 150,000 shares (0.37%), while Niraj Jalan and Others HUF sold 50,000 shares (0.25%). Both transactions were conducted off-market on April 22, 2026. Following these sales, the holding of these specific entities in the company has reduced to zero.

  • Promoter group entities sold shares in Nilachal Refractories.
  • A total of 0.62% stake was divested by the promoter group.
  • The transactions were executed through off-market deals.
  • The sales occurred on April 22, 2026.
  • These entities now hold 0% shares in the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NILACHAL REFRACTORIES LTD. | Category: Shareholding
